news.title:
SBI Life Insurance appoints Santosh Chacko as President - Business Strategy from April 6, 2026.
Abhijit Gulanikar to transition as President - Operations & IT from June 1, 2026, post redesignation.
news.summary:
SBI Life Insurance appoints Santosh Chacko as President - Business Strategy from April 6, 2026.
Abhijit Gulanikar to transition as President - Operations & IT from June 1, 2026, post redesignation.

news.title: SBI Life saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 45.42 Cr for 261,856 shares at Rs. 1734.5.
news.summary: SBI Life saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 45.42 Cr for 261,856 shares at Rs. 1734.5.

news.title:
SBI Life targets 15% APE CAGR FY26-28, shifting to high-margin traditional products.
Stable VNB margins (26-28%) and 18% operating RoEV expected; Buy TP set at ₹2,400.
news.summary:
SBI Life targets 15% APE CAGR FY26-28, shifting to high-margin traditional products.
Stable VNB margins (26-28%) and 18% operating RoEV expected; Buy TP set at ₹2,400.

news.title:
SBI Life and LIC fell initially but recovered slightly by over 1%.
Both showed strong growth in February due to a favorable base.
news.summary:
SBI Life and LIC fell initially but recovered slightly by over 1%.
Both showed strong growth in February due to a favorable base.

news.title:
Paisalo Digital plans March 11 board meeting to approve fundraising via non-convertible debentures.
SBI Life holds 6.83% stake; net income rose to ₹243 crore, stock fell 8.4% YTD in 2026.
news.summary:
Paisalo Digital plans March 11 board meeting to approve fundraising via non-convertible debentures.
SBI Life holds 6.83% stake; net income rose to ₹243 crore, stock fell 8.4% YTD in 2026.

news.title:
SBI Life Insurance executed NSE block trade of 351,294 shares at Rs. 1924.6.
The trade totaled Rs. 67.61 crores, highlighting significant market activity.
news.summary:
SBI Life Insurance executed NSE block trade of 351,294 shares at Rs. 1924.6.
The trade totaled Rs. 67.61 crores, highlighting significant market activity.

news.title:
SBI Life's tax liability reduced from Rs. 5317.18 Cr to Rs. 470.88 Cr.
Company has separately appealed the original tax order.
news.summary:
SBI Life's tax liability reduced from Rs. 5317.18 Cr to Rs. 470.88 Cr.
Company has separately appealed the original tax order.

news.title:
Paisalo Digital raised ₹30 crore via 600 commercial papers at ₹4.86 lakh each, maturing in 90 days.
SBI Life holds a 6.83% stake; stock gained 3.7% in Feb but lost 50% value from Apr 2024-Aug 2025.
news.summary:
Paisalo Digital raised ₹30 crore via 600 commercial papers at ₹4.86 lakh each, maturing in 90 days.
SBI Life holds a 6.83% stake; stock gained 3.7% in Feb but lost 50% value from Apr 2024-Aug 2025.

news.title:
Tata Capital approves ₹650.02 cr rights issue; IRFC raises ¥400 mn ECB loan for railway projects.
SBI Life declares ₹2.7 interim dividend; Lupin faces GST inspection; Shaily bags ₹423 cr pen injector deal.
news.summary:
Tata Capital approves ₹650.02 cr rights issue; IRFC raises ¥400 mn ECB loan for railway projects.
SBI Life declares ₹2.7 interim dividend; Lupin faces GST inspection; Shaily bags ₹423 cr pen injector deal.

news.title: SBI Life approves dividends of Rs 2.7/share for shareholders.
news.summary: SBI Life approves dividends of Rs 2.7/share for shareholders.

news.title:
SBI Life's board meeting on Feb 25, 2026, to decide interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window for SBI Life shares closed from Feb 21-27, 2026, per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
SBI Life's board meeting on Feb 25, 2026, to decide interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window for SBI Life shares closed from Feb 21-27, 2026, per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
SBI Life received a GST tax demand of Rs. 159.45 crore for FY 2018-19.
Issues include input tax credit claims and securities earnings; appeal planned.
news.summary:
SBI Life received a GST tax demand of Rs. 159.45 crore for FY 2018-19.
Issues include input tax credit claims and securities earnings; appeal planned.

news.title:
Temasek and ADIA plan to invest in Clean Max's ₹31B IPO, alongside HDFC AMC and SBI Life.
Clean Max, backed by Brookfield, reserved ₹9.3B for anchor investors at ₹1,053/share.
news.summary:
Temasek and ADIA plan to invest in Clean Max's ₹31B IPO, alongside HDFC AMC and SBI Life.
Clean Max, backed by Brookfield, reserved ₹9.3B for anchor investors at ₹1,053/share.

news.title:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.
news.summary:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.

news.title: SBI Life's January 1st-year premium rose 7.9% YoY to INR 35.34 billion.
news.summary: SBI Life's January 1st-year premium rose 7.9% YoY to INR 35.34 billion.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs maintains a positive outlook on SBI Life.
The target price for SBI Life has been increased to 2,385.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs maintains a positive outlook on SBI Life.
The target price for SBI Life has been increased to 2,385.

news.title:
SBILife's Q3 results show Total APE at ₹8,600 Cr, VNB at ₹2,290 Cr.
VNB Margin stood at 26.6% and New Business Premium reached ₹12,980 Cr.
news.summary:
SBILife's Q3 results show Total APE at ₹8,600 Cr, VNB at ₹2,290 Cr.
VNB Margin stood at 26.6% and New Business Premium reached ₹12,980 Cr.

news.title:
SBI Life's 9M FY26 new business premium rose 19% YoY to ₹313.3bn; APE grew 16% to ₹185.2bn.
Profit after tax grew 4% to ₹16.7bn; solvency ratio at 1.91; AuM increased 16% to ₹5.1tn.
news.summary:
SBI Life's 9M FY26 new business premium rose 19% YoY to ₹313.3bn; APE grew 16% to ₹185.2bn.
Profit after tax grew 4% to ₹16.7bn; solvency ratio at 1.91; AuM increased 16% to ₹5.1tn.

news.title:
SBI Life's board approved Q3 and 9-month audited financials for Dec 2025.
Audit reports are unmodified; trading window reopens on Jan 31, 2026.
news.summary:
SBI Life's board approved Q3 and 9-month audited financials for Dec 2025.
Audit reports are unmodified; trading window reopens on Jan 31, 2026.

news.title:
SBI Life Insurance reported Q3 net profit of ₹5.8B, up from ₹5.5B YoY.
The profit fell short of the estimated ₹6.1B for the quarter.
news.summary:
SBI Life Insurance reported Q3 net profit of ₹5.8B, up from ₹5.5B YoY.
The profit fell short of the estimated ₹6.1B for the quarter.
